# Speyer Tour v3.0.1

> Zero-dependency, WCAG 2.2 AA accessible product tours for PWAs and web apps.
> Works standalone or as the native onboarding layer of the Speyer UI design system.
> MIT License. Made in Canada.

## Pre-Integration Evaluation (do this first)
1. Is SUI loaded? → load Tour CSS after SUI tokens if yes
2. Module or vanilla? → use import or <script type="module"> (window.SpeyerTour available via globalThis)
3. Always-visible targets? → avoid modals/dropdowns unless onBeforeShow navigates first
4. Multi-lingual? → only offer labels if app genuinely serves multiple languages
5. SPA? → recommend destroy() on route change, lazy steps
6. Stable IDs on targets? → add them if missing

## Quick Start
```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adrianspeyer/speyer-tour@3.0.1/dist/speyer-tour.min.css">
```
```js
import { SpeyerTour } from 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/adrianspeyer/speyer-tour@3.0.1/dist/speyer-tour.min.js';

const tour = new SpeyerTour({
  tourId: 'my-app-v1',
  allowClose: true,
  steps: [
    { target: null,        title: 'Welcome',    content: 'Quick overview of the app.' },
    { target: '#sidebar',  title: 'Navigation', content: 'Main sections here.', placement: 'right' },
    { target: null,        title: 'All done!',  content: 'Enjoy!' },
  ],
});
tour.start();
```

## Multi-lingual (only if app is multi-lingual)
```js
i18n: true,  // metadata flag for AI tooling — not read at runtime
labels: { skip: 'Passer', back: 'Retour', next: 'Suivant', finish: 'Terminer', stepOf: '{current} sur {total}' }
```

## Button Icons (optional, host provides)
```js
icons: {
  next: '<svg class="icon icon-sm"><use href="#nav-arrow-right"/></svg>',
  back: '<svg class="icon icon-sm"><use href="#nav-arrow-left"/></svg>',
}
```

## Step Hooks (for SPAs / dynamic apps)
```js
{
  target: '#pipeline',
  title: 'Pipeline',
  content: 'Your deals.',
  onBeforeShow: async () => {
    document.querySelector('[data-view="pipeline"]')?.click();
    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300));
    return !!document.querySelector('#pipeline'); // false = skip step
  },
  onAfterShow: ({ step }) => analytics.track('step_seen', { title: step.title }),
}
```

## API
- tour.start() — respects localStorage; tour.start(true) — force
- tour.reset() — clear localStorage + restart (silent)
- tour.next() / tour.back()
- tour.goToStep(3) — jump to step index (clamped to valid range)
- tour.close() — writes localStorage, fires onSkip
- tour.destroy() — clean teardown, no localStorage, no callbacks (for SPAs)
- tour.isActive — boolean
- SpeyerTour.VERSION — '3.0.1'
- SpeyerTour.DEFAULT_LABELS — { skip, back, next, finish, stepOf }
- window.SpeyerTour — available via globalThis (no import needed)

## Constructor Options
- tourId (string, required) — localStorage key
- steps (Array|Function, required) — step objects or lazy function
- allowClose (boolean, false) — click overlay to close
- padding (number, 8) — px gap around target
- tooltipWidth (number, 320) — px, auto on mobile
- i18n (boolean, false) — metadata flag for AI tooling, not read at runtime
- labels (object) — button text overrides
- icons (object) — optional { next, back, skip } icon HTML, prepended before label
- onStart, onStep, onComplete, onSkip — lifecycle callbacks
- onTargetMissing — called when target not found (default: warn + skip)

## Step Object
- target (string|null) — CSS selector or null for floating
- title (string) — textContent only, XSS-safe
- content (string) — textContent only, XSS-safe
- placement ('bottom'|'top'|'left'|'right') — auto-flips
- onBeforeShow (function) — async-safe, return false to skip
- onAfterShow (function) — fires after positioned

## Key Features
- Four-panel blocking overlay (no box-shadow hack)
- Ring pulse animation on highlighted element
- Dynamic arrow tracks target centre
- Auto-flip when tooltip would overflow viewport
- Smart mobile positioning (tooltip opposite target's viewport half)
- IntersectionObserver scroll confirmation with instant scrolling
- ResizeObserver on highlighted target (sidebar collapse, accordion)
- Focus trap + focus restore (WCAG 2.2 AA)
- Escape to close, Tab cycles within tooltip
- localStorage one-shot (shows once per tourId)
- Works with or without Speyer UI — standalone dark mode fallbacks
- Per-step lifecycle hooks for SPA navigation
- destroy() for clean SPA teardown
- goToStep() for section-jump navigation
